title: Build a Book Inventory App
description: A certification project: a book inventory table using advanced CSS attribute selectors throughout. Row backgrounds use tr[class='read'], status badges use tr[class='to-read'] span[class='status'], and star ratings use span[class~='one'] :first-child with linear-gradient to fill 1, 2, or 3 stars.
objectives: Use tr[class='value'] attribute selectors to target specific row types
Use span[class^='rate'] to target elements whose class starts with 'rate'
Use span[class~='one'] to target elements whose class contains the word 'one'
Use :first-child and :nth-child to selectively fill star rating spans
Use linear-gradient on background-image for status badge styling
